channel.title: RadicalAnthropology on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in RadicalAnthropology on Nature Works

item.title: Radical Horticulture
item.description:
Gardens are irrevocably connected to society, and we need a radical shake-up of both

I read Benjamin Vogt’s A New Garden Ethic a few years ago (it’s brililant, have a read), and he continues joining up the dots between society, politics, economics and gardening with native plants. http://localhost:1313/blog/230805-radical-horticulture/

item.title: Reactionary horticulture & the bastions of colonialism
item.description:
It was only a matter of time before the culture wars were made explicit in gardening

This from Rebecca McMackin’s newsletter Shots fired! Famed, old-guard British gardening celebrities have their knickers in a twist over any attempt to make ornamental gardens more ecological. http://localhost:1313/blog/230719-reactionary-horticulture/
